title: GsdStuckContracts
description: Artifacts written when a `compose gsd` run halts. A STUCK halt (COMP-GSD-5) writes stuck.json/stuck.md; a BUDGET halt (COMP-GSD-4) writes budget.json/budget.md. Both persist `pause.json` (machine-readable resume state); `compose gsd <feature> --resume` reads it, validates ownership/mode, and re-dispatches decomposedTasks minus completedTaskIds (completed results already live in the blackboard). The pause `kind` field (optional; absent ⇒ 'stuck' for back-compat) discriminates: a 'stuck' pause carries the stuck-specific fields, a 'budget' pause carries the `budget` block. GSD-6 reuses the `pause` shape for automatic crash-recovery.

stuck.title: GsdStuckDiagnostic
stuck.description: Structured diagnostic emitted on the first stuck verdict for a task.

feature.description: Feature code the gsd run is building (e.g. COMP-GSD-5).

taskId.description: The decomposed task id that tripped the detector.

signal.description: Which stuck pattern fired. same_file: one file edited >= sameFileEdits times. error_recurrence: a normalized error hash recurred >= errorRepeats. no_progress: >= noProgressCalls consecutive non-file-changing tool calls. wall_clock: task ran >= wallClockMs without finishing.

detail.description: Human-readable explanation of the offending file / error / stall.

attemptCounts.description: Snapshot of the per-task counters at the moment of the verdict.

sameFileEdits.description: Max edit count across files for this task.

errorRepeats.description: Max repeat count across normalized error hashes.

partialDiff.description: Optional unified diff of the stuck task's worktree at halt time, for triage.

pause.title: GsdPauseState
pause.description: Resume state persisted on a stuck OR budget halt. Drives blackboard-driven re-dispatch on --resume — NOT mid-task re-entry. Base required fields are kind-agnostic; the `kind` field (optional; absent ⇒ stuck) selects which extra fields are required via the if/then/else at the end.

kind.description: Halt kind. Optional for back-compat: an absent kind is interpreted as 'stuck'. Determines which extra fields are required (see if/then/else).

budget.description: Present on a budget halt (kind='budget'). The enforced axis that tripped + the stratum budget_state snapshot.

axis.description: Which enforced stratum axis reached its cap (null if indeterminate).

flowId.description: Stratum flow id of the halted run (informational; resume opens a fresh flow).

stepId.description: The parallel_dispatch step id that was cancelled (e.g. execute).

stuckTaskId.description: The task id that tripped the detector.

decomposedTasks.description: The full decomposed task list, persisted so --resume does NOT re-decompose (stable task ids).

completedTaskIds.description: Task ids whose VALIDATED result is already in the blackboard. --resume skips these.

pid.description: OS pid of the process that wrote the pause file. --resume refuses if this pid is still alive (another owner).

mode.description: Run mode. --resume refuses if this is not 'gsd' (mirrors `compose fix --resume` mode guard).

ts.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the pause file was written.
